desc: This MONTH YEAR [preview|ballot|draft] snapshot supports the [testing|MONTH YEAR Ballot|MONTH YEAR Connectathon] of AU Patient Summary
title: AU Patient Summary
introduction: This implementation guide is to support the use of patient summaries in HL7® FHIR®© in an Australian context. It complies with the requirements defined in IPS and AU Core, and sets the minimum expectations on FHIR resources to support conformance and implementation in systems.
